rawAssistant: A seeker of truth and whispers in the darkness, I see. The moonwell is an ancient well, one that holds secrets and reflections of the heart. Its waters are said to reveal the trust between a monster and its handler, a bond that can shape the very essence of evolution. Come, let me show you our sacred space, and we shall unravel the mysteries of the lowland glow together.
